system.description: You dispatch any poisons, venoms, and infectious agents. If you target a creature, the creature can make a Strength roll. On a failure, it loses any trait that bestows the poisoned affliction or that would expose a creature to infection for 1 minute. If the creature suffers from the effects of infection, the infection ends. Finally, if you target an object, any ordinary poison, toxin, or infection it contains is destroyed.
system.target: One Size 1 creature or object within 5 yards
